rows.label: qev093204_MSG0010
rows.name:
Here—the suid meat you were after.
NOW you can give me pizza, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's actually...kind of
impressive. The lengths you've
gone to, just to eat pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0040
rows.name:
I told you. When I start
something, I see it through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0050
rows.name:
You never know when life'll deal
you a bum hand. We could shuffle
off this coil tomorrow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0060
rows.name: I don't want any regrets—in anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0080
rows.name:
You've been real patient
with me as well, buddy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0090
rows.name:
You know, I was just planning for us
to eat out, but... Change of plans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0100
rows.name:
I'm gonna throw us the pizza party
of a lifetime! Think of it as your
reward for all the hard work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0110
rows.name:
Ah, then, you'll be
wanting them delivered?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0120
rows.name: Yeah. Send 'em to the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0130
rows.name:
And as for the bill... Commander
Vandham at BLADE HQ will foot it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0140
rows.name:
Got it! One super-express
pizza train comin' right up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093204_MSG0150
rows.name:
Excellent! And now we wait.
Come on, let's head back.[ST:wait ]
